title: Dispatcher: PR merge detection — auto-transition review task to done
description:
When a task reaches `review` status, `validateStageCompletion()` blocks advancement until `github_pull_request.state === 'merged'`. But nothing currently detects the merge and transitions the task. Marcus has to manually update the canonical file or the task stays blocked in review forever.

Fix: in `inspectActiveHookClaims()`, for tasks with `status === 'review'` and `github_pull_request.number` set, call `gh pr view <number> --repo <repo> --json state,mergedAt` and if `state === 'MERGED'`, update the task:
- Set `status: done`, `workflow_stage: done`
- Set `github_pull_request.state: merged`, `last_synced_at: now`
- Set `timestamps.completed_at: mergedAt`
- Write to both runtime state and canonical task file
- Send lifecycle notification

Scope: only check PRs for tasks that have been in review for > 5 minutes (avoid immediate re-check on dispatch). Use `runGh()` already available in the dispatcher.
handoff_notes:
[agent:engineer][task:ops-0041] Implementation complete.

## What changed

Added PR merge auto-detection to `inspectActiveHookClaims()` in `operations/bin/task-dispatcher.mjs` (lines ~1875-1940).

For every task iteration, before the existing hook-claim processing, the code now:
1. Checks if `task.status === 'review'` AND `task.github_pull_request.number` AND `task.github_pull_request.repo` are set
2. Checks if the task has been in review for > 5 minutes (using `task.timestamps.updated_at`)
3. Calls `gh pr view <number> --repo <repo> --json state,mergedAt` via existing `runGh()` helper
4. If `state === 'MERGED'`: sets `status: done`, `workflow_stage: done`, `github_pull_request.state: merged`, `github_pull_request.last_synced_at: now`, `timestamps.completed_at: mergedAt`; clears `blocked_by` and `failure_reason`; writes to canonical file; sends `pr_auto_merged` lifecycle notification; logs `pr_merge_auto_detected`
5. Parse errors and gh failures are logged as `pr_merge_check_parse_error` / `pr_merge_check_failed` but do not block or crash the loop

## Validation

- `node --check operations/bin/task-dispatcher.mjs` → no errors
- Syntax verified, no changes to function signatures or exports
- Uses only existing helpers: `runGh()`, `ensureSpecialistRepoView()`, `writeJson()`, `notifyAndRecord()`, `appendLog()`

## Artifacts
- Modified: `operations/bin/task-dispatcher.mjs` — added ~65 lines in `inspectActiveHookClaims()`

artifacts.description: Added PR merge auto-detection in inspectActiveHookClaims()
